name: reka-ui
title: Reka UI
description: Browse Reka UI documentation via Raycast
author: twirl

commands.name: search-components
commands.title: Search Components
commands.description: Search components provided by Reka UI

preferences.name: description
preferences.label: Show description
preferences.description: Show the description section in component metadata panel

preferences.name: features
preferences.label: Show features
preferences.description: Show the features section in component metadata panel

preferences.name: anatomy
preferences.label: Show anatomy
preferences.description: Show the anatomy section in component metadata panel

preferences.name: ghPat
preferences.title: GitHub PAT
preferences.description: GitHub personal access token (PAT) to prevent rate-limiting

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
